overview.description: Data & AI consulting company helping agricultural and industrial companies innovate with custom data, IoT, and AI solutions.
overview.description_long: Founded in 2015 by Tomáš Borovička and Ondřej Stuchlík, Datamole is a Prague-based Data & AI consulting firm serving industrial and agricultural clients across Europe. The team of 80+ specialists delivers end-to-end data and AI projects — from strategy and data engineering to IoT integration, machine learning models, and custom enterprise applications. With 100+ successful projects delivered, Datamole's clients include precision farming machine manufacturers, robotic milking companies, and coffee machine operators. The company maintains offices in Prague, Brno, and Český Krumlov.
overview.tagline: We bring industrial companies to the forefront of data innovation

history.origin_story: Founded in 2015 by Tomáš Borovička (CEO) and Ondřej Stuchlík (CTO) with a vision to build a company where people work on rewarding projects and maintain strong team relationships. Grew organically into an 80+ person firm serving agricultural and industrial customers across Europe.

key_milestones.event: Founded in Prague by Tomáš Borovička and Ondřej Stuchlík
Surpassed 100+ successful data & AI projects delivered
Grew to 80+ team members across 3 Czech offices

metadata.notes: No CNAIP URL available. Company appears to be bootstrapped — no funding rounds found via search. ~80 employees across 3 Czech offices. 100+ successful projects. Focus on industrial/agricultural IoT and AI. Founders confirmed from quotes on About page. Glassdoor search blocked by bot detection.
